productDisplayName: Peter England Men Solid Red Polo T-Shirt
description: Composition Red polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, embroidered brand theme on the left chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry falt in shade Warm iron Chuck boredom out of your life, slip into this polo neck T-shirt from the Oddies collection of peter england and revel in exemplary comfort. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this tee is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Add on denims and suede shoes, and strap on a classy belt. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
